title: Sunseeker Manhattan 55
description:
This 2025 Sunseeker Manhattan 55 is a 17.21-meter British flybridge motor yacht powered by twin MAN i6-800 engines delivering a top speed of 32 knots and a range of 250 nautical miles.

She accommodates 6 guests across 3 en-suite cabins, including a full-beam master suite with full standing headroom. Her innovative powered glass cockpit window creates a seamless indoor-outdoor living space, while the class-leading flybridge with hardtop offers unrivalled deck volume for a yacht of this size.

Currently located in the UAE and available for immediate viewing. Contact us for full specifications and a private appointment.
